metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from her hand. It fell to the floor. It broke into many pieces. She swept them up carefully.

The dark storm clouds rolled slowly into the green valley. Heavy rain poured steadily onto the dry and dusty ground. The small river quickly overflowed its muddy grass banks. Flood water rushed aggressively into the nearby empty farm fields.

He placed the chopped raw vegetables into the large metal pot. The boiling hot water cooked them until they were very soft. He blended the entire mixture into a thick and smooth puree. The warm delicious soup was served immediately in small ceramic bowls.

The loud alarm clock rang sharply on the wooden nightstand. She reached over quickly and turned off the annoying noise. She slowly climbed out of the warm and comfortable bed. She walked straight into the dark kitchen to brew fresh coffee.

The young boy accidentally dropped his bright red helium balloon. The strong wind caught the string and carried it away. The balloon floated high above the tall green park trees. It finally disappeared completely into the thick gray rain clouds.

The large dog saw a small squirrel across the busy street. He pulled very hard on his long brown leather leash. The metal collar snapped from the sudden strong physical force. The dog sprinted quickly toward the frightened and hiding animal.

She planted the small vegetable seeds in the backyard garden. She watered the dark soil every morning before going to work. Tiny green shoots emerged slowly from the wet garden dirt. The plants eventually grew into tall and brightly blooming flowers.

The baker mixed white flour and warm water in a bowl. He kneaded the sticky dough thoroughly on the wooden table. He placed the shaped bread loaf into the hot brick oven. The freshly baked bread filled the room with a wonderful aroma.

The experienced mechanic lifted the heavy metal hood of the car. He found a large dangerous crack in the black rubber hose. He replaced the broken engine part with a brand new one. The repaired vehicle started smoothly on the very first attempt.

The strict teacher handed out the final difficult math exam. The nervous students worked quietly on the complex word problems. The school bell rang loudly at the end of the class. Everyone handed their finished test papers to the front wooden desk.

The white snow began to fall heavily during the late afternoon. It quickly covered the busy city roads in a slippery blanket. The large city plows cleared the frozen streets throughout the night. Grateful drivers commuted safely to their warm offices the next morning.

He struck the wooden match against the rough small paper box. The quick friction created a bright orange and dancing hot flame. He touched the small fire to the dry crumpled newspaper pages. The wooden logs caught fire and warmed the cold living room.

The orange cat jumped high onto the tall kitchen counter. It carelessly knocked a glass cup over the sharp table edge. The fragile cup shattered loudly on the hard ceramic tile floor. The sudden noise startled the cat into another empty dark room.

The tired runner tripped over a raised crack in the sidewalk. She scraped her bare knee on the rough grey concrete surface. She carefully cleaned the bleeding wound with mild soap and water. She placed a sticky plastic bandage over the small painful scratch.

The bright sun set slowly behind the distant purple mountain range. The sky turned completely dark and revealed countless shining silver stars. The air temperature dropped rapidly in the quiet and empty desert. Small nocturnal animals emerged cautiously from their hidden underground dirt burrows.

The busy farmer scattered large handfuls of feed across the yard. The hungry chickens ran quickly toward the scattered yellow corn grains. They pecked aggressively at the delicious food on the dry dirt. The satisfied birds finished their large meal and returned to the coop.

She poured boiling hot water over the dried green tea leaves. The clear water turned a deep shade of dark yellowish green. She waited patiently for the hot aromatic beverage to cool down. She drank the sweet tea slowly while reading her favorite book.

The young boy threw the heavy gray rock into the pond. The large stone splashed loudly into the dark and still water. Small circular ripples spread outward from the exact impact center point. The water surface eventually became completely flat and smooth once again.

The distracted driver pressed hard on the stiff mechanical brake pedal. The heavy car skidded slightly on the wet and slippery road. The sliding vehicle came to a sudden stop before the intersection. The red traffic light changed to a bright green a moment later.

The talented painter dipped his wooden brush into the blue paint. He applied thick wet strokes across the large blank white canvas. He stepped backward to carefully examine his newly created modern artwork. He added some bright yellow highlights to complete the beautiful landscape.

The fierce wind blew violently against the old wooden farmhouse exterior. A large dead branch snapped off the ancient tall oak tree. The heavy wood crashed loudly onto the dark shingled house roof. The terrifying impact woke the entire sleeping family from their beds.

The hungry customer placed her lunch order at the front counter. The skilled chef prepared the hot meal in the busy kitchen. A friendly server brought the steaming food directly to the table. The happy woman ate her delicious dinner with a silver fork.

He inserted the cold brass key into the heavy front door. He turned the metal lock until it clicked open very loudly. He pushed the solid wooden door into the dark entrance hallway. He stepped quietly inside and took off his wet winter shoes.

The small child built a tall tower using colorful plastic blocks. He carefully placed one final square piece on the very top. The unstable plastic structure swayed back and forth for a brief moment. The scattered pieces crashed loudly onto the soft living room carpet.

She typed the final concluding words of her long history essay. She clicked the green print button on her bright computer screen. The laser printer hummed loudly and produced three typed paper pages. She stapled the white papers together neatly in the top corner.

The old battery in the plastic flashlight died completely in the dark. He opened the round casing to remove the dead chemical cells. He inserted two fresh power batteries into the empty metal tube. The glass bulb immediately produced a bright beam of white light.

The large spider spun a sticky web between two tree branches. A small careless fly flew directly into the invisible silk threads. The hungry spider quickly wrapped the struggling insect in more silk. The successful predator consumed its fresh meal in the quiet forest.

He put the dirty dinner plates into the empty washing machine. He added a small plastic packet of lemon scented cleaning detergent. He pressed the green start button on the digital control panel. The loud machine sprayed hot soapy water to clean the dishes.

The lonely hiker lost his specific way in the dense dark forest. He used his magnetic compass to find the true northern direction. He walked steadily and carefully toward the distant tall mountain peak. He eventually found the clearly marked trail leading towards the camp.

The bright theater lights dimmed slowly before the featured movie started. The massive screen illuminated the dark and completely quiet viewing room. The large audience watched the exciting action film for two full hours. Everyone clapped loudly when the final ending credits finally appeared onscreen.
noncausal_texts: A violin is played with a bow. A flute is played by blowing air. A drum is played by striking it. A harp is played by plucking strings.

Oak trees produce small hard green acorns during the cool autumn season. Pine trees maintain their sharp green needles throughout the entire calendar year. Maple trees drop their broad and colorful leaves before the freezing winter. Birch trees grow very distinctive peeling white bark on their tall trunks.

Jupiter features a massive swirling atmospheric storm called the Great Red Spot. Venus possesses an incredibly thick atmosphere composed entirely of carbon dioxide gas. Mars contains a vast and deep canyon system named Valles Marineris. Saturn exhibits highly prominent and beautiful rings made of floating ice and rock.

The vast Pacific Ocean separates the major continents of Asia and North America. The Indian Ocean directly borders the long eastern coast of the African continent. The Atlantic Ocean lies perfectly between the European and massive American landmasses. The freezing Arctic Ocean completely surrounds the icy northern pole of the Earth.

Baking soda reacts very strongly with acidic household liquids like white vinegar. Standard table salt consists entirely of sodium and chloride chemical elements. Granulated sugar dissolves completely when stirred into hot liquid drinks. White cornstarch thickens watery cooking sauces when heated in a metal pan.

African lions live together in social family groups commonly known as prides. Wild cheetahs run at incredible top speeds across the open grassy savanna. Strong leopards carry their hunted heavy prey up into high tree branches. Bengal tigers possess uniquely distinctive striped patterns on their bright orange fur coats.

Solid copper wire conducts electrical currents efficiently for residential home power systems. Heavy steel provides immense structural support for constructing modern tall skyscraper buildings. Lightweight aluminum offers a perfect metallic material for manufacturing commercial airplane bodies. Pure gold heavily resists natural chemical tarnishing in the production of fine jewelry.

Orange carrots grow entirely underground as a crunchy and edible root vegetable. Red tomatoes develop above the damp dirt on sprawling green leafy vines. Healthy broccoli plants produce tight edible clusters of tiny dark green flower buds. Large pumpkins rest heavily on the garden dirt as thick ribbed autumn fruits.

The human heart pumps freshly oxygenated blood throughout the entire circulatory system. The stomach breaks down consumed daily food using naturally strong internal digestive acids. The lungs exchange vital invisible gases during the continuous biological process of breathing. The liver filters harmful toxic chemical substances directly from the human bloodstream.

Solid granite forms from slowly cooling liquid magma deep beneath the planetary surface. Porous sandstone consists of heavily compressed mineral grains from ancient dried river beds. Black obsidian creates a smooth natural glass from rapidly cooling hot volcanic lava. Beautiful marble originates from standard limestone subjected to extreme geological underground heat.

Bald eagles build massively large stick nests high in the branches of tall trees. Emperor penguins swim rapidly through freezing oceanic waters to catch small silver fish. African ostriches run across dry open landscapes on long and highly muscular legs. Barn owls hunt small nocturnal prey using their incredibly excellent low light vision.

Lightweight helium gas easily fills floating party balloons due to its low molecular density. Glowing neon illuminates the brightly colored glass signs used by retail businesses at night. Pure oxygen heavily supports the natural chemical process of combustion for hot open fires. Invisible nitrogen makes up the vast overwhelming majority of the Earth's breathable atmosphere.

The brass saxophone utilizes a single wooden mouthpiece reed to produce vibrating musical sound. The trumpet requires the active musician to buzz their lips into a metal mouthpiece. The trombone changes internal musical pitch using a very long sliding metal tube. The tuba produces incredibly deep low notes through a massively large brass horn bell.

Light cotton fabrics offer excellent cooling breathability for warm and sunny summer clothing. Thick wool sweaters provide highly essential bodily insulation against freezing outdoor winter temperatures. Expensive silk garments always feature a wonderfully smooth and naturally shiny surface texture. Heavy leather jackets block harsh cold winds with a tough protective animal hide layer.

Worker honeybees collect sweet floral nectar from brightly colorful blooming spring garden flowers. Small earthworms aerate the dark damp dirt by continuously tunneling deep below the surface. Spotted ladybugs aggressively consume destructive tiny aphids on the broad leaves of green plants. Winged butterflies actively pollinate various open blossoms while searching carefully for daily food sources.

A standard square contains exactly four perfectly equal sides and four internal right angles. A simple triangle encloses flat geometric space using exactly three straight interconnected border lines. A regular hexagon features exactly six distinct straight exterior edges in its geometric shape. A perfect circle maintains a strictly constant radius distance from a single central point.

The massive Amazon River flows heavily through the dense green rainforests of South America. The long Nile River travels directly northward across the dry and sandy Egyptian desert. The Yangtze River provides essential fresh water for massive regional agricultural farms in China. The wide Mississippi River eventually empties completely into the warm salty Gulf of Mexico.

Fresh bread requires slow baking in a hot domestic oven to achieve a solid crust. Hard pasta needs rapidly boiling salted water to sufficiently soften the dry shaped wheat noodles. White rice absorbs cooking liquid very slowly when simmered gently in a covered metal pot. Whole potatoes become wonderfully soft and tender after being baked for a full uninterrupted hour.

A heavy hammer drives sharp metal nails firmly into thick solid wooden building boards. A manual screwdriver manually turns threaded metal fasteners into pre-drilled shallow wooden pilot holes. A sharp saw cuts easily through pine lumber using a flat blade with teeth. A steel wrench tightly secures hexagonal metal nuts onto perfectly matching threaded mechanical bolts.

Classic checkers involves strategically moving round plastic pieces diagonally across a square checkered game board. Traditional chess requires the calculated strategic movement of highly distinct pieces like knights and rooks. Standard poker uses a completely normal paper deck of fifty-two playing cards for gambling games. Simple dominoes involves visually matching painted numbered dots on small rectangular flat plastic tiles.

Pure water boils very rapidly when it safely reaches exactly one hundred degrees Celsius. Solid ice naturally melts into clear liquid when exposed directly to warm indoor room temperatures. Hot steam freely rises into the ambient air when liquid water is heated intensely. White frost visibly forms on freezing cold outdoor surfaces during dark freezing winter nights.

Competitive basketball requires players to bounce the ball while moving across the hard court. International soccer strictly forbids the intentional use of human hands during regular active field play. Beach volleyball involves aggressively hitting a lightweight ball over a high and tightly suspended net. Traditional baseball heavily relies on hitting a fast pitched ball with a solid wooden bat.

A heavy dictionary provides formal definitions and accurate pronunciations for thousands of different vocabulary words. A geographic atlas contains detailed colorful maps of various international countries and large global regions. A printed encyclopedia offers detailed informational articles on a wide range of academic subjects. A helpful thesaurus clearly lists related synonyms and direct antonyms for selected English vocabulary terms.

Dairy cows graze continuously on open green grassy pastures to produce fresh raw liquid milk. Domestic sheep grow thick wool coats that are safely sheared for commercial clothing textile production. Farm pigs consume a heavily varied daily diet of grains in enclosed muddy outdoor pens. Riding horses transport human riders across open country fields using their incredibly strong muscular legs.

A modern bicycle operates entirely using human pedaling power on two thin rubber wheels. A heavy train travels incredibly long distances on heavily fixed parallel steel metal railroad tracks. A loud helicopter hovers directly in the air using massive spinning top rotary lift blades. A military submarine navigates completely silently deep beneath the dark surface of the global ocean.

Medical penicillin actively kills dangerous bacterial infections within the complex human biological immune system. Common aspirin safely reduces mild physical pain and effectively lowers dangerously elevated high body temperatures. Injectable insulin directly regulates the exact amount of glucose sugar present in the human bloodstream. Natural melatonin helps the brain establish a highly regular and healthy nightly sleep schedule.

Roasted coffee beans grow inside small red berries on tropical green evergreen agricultural bushes. Green tea leaves are manually harvested from specific leafy shrubs cultivated in hot humid climates. Raw cocoa pods naturally develop directly on the thick wooden trunks of specialized tropical trees. Sweet vanilla beans are carefully cured dark seed pods obtained from specific climbing tropical orchids.

A dynamic microphone accurately converts acoustic physical sound waves into usable electronic audio data signals. A loud speaker perfectly translates electrical audio currents back into audible human acoustic sound frequencies. A digital camera quickly captures incoming ambient light to record visual images onto digital sensors. A computer monitor displays rendered digital data as colorful pictures on a flat glass screen.

Powerful earthquakes shake the ground due to naturally moving massive tectonic rock plates far underground. Tropical hurricanes actively form violently spinning massive wind storms over incredibly warm tropical ocean waters. Violent tornadoes quickly create highly destructive rotating funnel clouds that touch the flat dirt earth. Active volcanoes erupt with extremely hot flowing molten lava from deep beneath the planetary crust.

The sensitive retina detects incoming ambient light at the very back of the human eye. The internal cochlea naturally translates physical acoustic sound vibrations deep within the human inner ear. The biological olfactory bulb processes various distinct chemical smells inhaled through the open nasal cavity. The numerous taste buds identify basic sweet and salty flavors on the wet human tongue.
